name: rqml
description: Keep Codex aligned with RQML requirements, trace links, and deterministic checks.

interface.shortDescription: Make Codex code from requirements, not guesswork.
interface.longDescription: Adopt RQML in a Codex repo, anchor every session on the spec, trace code and tests back to requirements, and finish only when the deterministic rqml check gate passes.
defaultPrompt: Draft requirements before coding this change.
Check whether this implementation still matches the spec.
